items.title: Izašli detalji sporazuma Amerike i Irana. Trump: Vrijeme je na našoj strani
items.summary: AMERIČKI državni tajnik Marco Rubio izjavio je da je u pregovorima s Iranom postignut "značajan napredak".

items.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
items.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

items.title: Iran team trains through World Cup uncertainty
items.summary: Al Jazeera exclusive footage follows Iran’s national football team as they train for the World Cup in Turkiye.

items.title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
items.summary: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.

items.title: Turkish police storm main opposition CHP’s party headquarters
items.summary: Violence erupted after Turkish police stormed the headquarters of the main opposition CHP party in Ankara.

items.title: China’s Shenzhou-23 astronauts blast off on space station mission
items.summary: China’s Shenzhou-23 astronauts blast off on space station mission.

items.title: Iran recounts historic battles in response to Trump’s talk of agreement
items.summary: Iran cites battles from history in response to Trump's latest comments on an imminent deal between the US and Iran.

items.title: U šumi kod Berlina pronađen mrtav biznismen porijeklom iz BiH. "Mafijaško ubojstvo"
items.summary: ISTRAŽITELJI sumnjaju na profesionalnu likvidaciju povezanu s organiziranim kriminalom.

items.title: Silovali maloljetnice u Britaniji, ne idu u zatvor. Oglasio se Starmer
items.summary: TRI TINEJDŽERA u Velikoj Britaniji izbjegla su zatvor za silovanje dviju djevojčica. Oglasio se Starmer.

items.title: Kina lansirala letjelicu s ljudskom posadom u svemir
items.summary: KINA je lansirala novu ljudsku misiju Shenzhou-23 s astronautom iz Hong Konga radi eksperimenata dugotrajnog boravka u svemiru.

items.title: Masovni prosvjed u Srbiji. "Vučićev režim je prvi put ozbiljno ugrožen od 2012."
items.summary: MASOVNI studentski prosvjed u Beogradu, potaknut tragedijom i zahtjevom za prijevremenim izborima, najveći je izazov za Vučića od 2012., pokazujući snažan studentski pokret.

items.title: Uklonjeno spomen-obilježje HVO-a u BiH. "Pokušaj zatiranja tragova Hrvata"
items.summary: U MODRANU je uklonjeno spomen-obilježje HVO-u, a udruge Domovinskog rata oštro prosvjeduju.

items.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
items.summary: The 39-year-old was fatally injured at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland, apparently while spearfishing.

items.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
items.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

items.title: Trump: Pregovori s Iranom su konstruktivni, ali blokada ostaje na snazi
items.summary: TRUMP pregovore s Iranom smatra konstruktivnima, ali blokada ostaje dok se ne spriječi razvoj nuklearnog oružja.

items.title: ‘A paper city’: New York ‘library’ hosts 3.5 million pages of Epstein files
items.summary: A US 'library' holding 3.5 million pages of documents attempts to bring accountability for victims of Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: VIDEO Turski policajci napali sjedište oporbene stranke
items.summary: TURSKA policija upala je suzavcem u sjedište glavne oporbene stranke CHP kako bi izbacila smijenjeno vodstvo nakon sudske odluke, produbljujući političku krizu.

items.title: Bivši britanski ministar: Milijun mladih ne radi, prijeti nam katastrofa
items.summary: BIVŠI britanski ministar upozorava na ekonomsku katastrofu jer gotovo milijun mladih ne radi niti se obrazuje.

items.title: VIDEO "Da, to je bio Orešnik": Strašne snimke iz Kijeva, stigla prva reakcija Rusije
items.summary: RUSI su napali Kijev Orešnikom, velika razaranja diljem grada. Ima mrtvih i puno ranjenih.
